name: Dale's & Bartlett Motors
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here car financing dealer in San Antonio offering vehicle sales with in-house financing and low down payments starting at $995.
description_long:
Dale's & Bartlett Motors began operations in 1980 as Dale's Motor Co., establishing itself as a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) financing provider in San Antonio, Texas. The company has operated for over 40 years serving customers in the local community with vehicle financing solutions. They operate two physical locations: one focused on vehicles and financing at 1426 SE Military Dr, and another dedicated to payments and service at 6803 S. Flores St.

The company offers used vehicle sales paired with in-house financing, eliminating the need for traditional bank loans or third-party lenders. Their inventory includes 80+ vehicles with limited warranty coverage available for purchase. Down payments start as low as $995 (marketed as "Drive Out" pricing), with example vehicles including 2008-2011 model year compact and mid-size cars. Customers can apply online, receive pre-approval, or complete a 15-minute in-person approval process. The company also offers online payment options for existing customers.

Dale's & Bartlett Motors distinguishes itself through direct dealer financing, eliminating credit bureau dependency for approval. They provide bilingual service (Se Habla Español) and maintain dual locations for convenience—one for purchases and one for ongoing payments and vehicle service. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility for customers who may have difficulty obtaining traditional auto financing, positioning themselves as a community-focused alternative.

The primary limitation is that this is vehicle-specific financing, not general personal lending. Interest rates and actual monthly payments are not disclosed on the website. As a BHPH dealer, they retain GPS tracking and payment monitoring capabilities typical of the BHPH model, which some consumers view as intrusive. The company's long history and local presence are positive indicators, but no third-party reviews or complaint data are visible on their website.
address: 1426 SE Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78214

company_info.headquarters: 1426 SE Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78214

pros: Low down payments starting at $995 enable vehicle access for credit-challenged buyers
In-house financing bypasses traditional bank requirements and credit score gatekeeping
80+ vehicle inventory with limited warranty provides selection and minimal coverage
Dual locations separate sales (SE Military) from payments/service (S. Flores) for convenience
15-minute in-person approval process offers fast financing turnaround
Online payment option allows remote account management for existing customers
Bilingual service (Se Habla Español) serves diverse San Antonio community
40+ year operating history demonstrates longevity and local market presence
cons: No interest rates, APR, or payment terms disclosed on website—opaque pricing structure
Buy Here Pay Here model typically includes GPS tracking and payment monitoring, raising privacy concerns
Limited warranty on vehicles is vague; specific coverage details not defined
Inventory consists entirely of older used vehicles (2007-2011 model years shown), no newer stock
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on company website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers unable to secure traditional auto loans
Individuals with poor credit histories who need transportation for work or daily life
San Antonio residents without reliable vehicle access who prefer local in-person service
Buyers seeking fast approval and immediate vehicle access with minimal down payment
diagnosis: Dale's & Bartlett Motors is best for San Antonio residents with poor credit or no credit history who need vehicle financing quickly and cannot qualify for traditional bank auto loans. The primary caveat is that Buy Here Pay Here financing typically carries high interest rates, GPS vehicle tracking, and strict payment enforcement—not disclosed on their website—making it an expensive and monitored form of credit suitable only when alternatives are unavailable.
services: Buy Here Pay Here vehicle financing with in-house lending
Used vehicle sales and inventory (80+ vehicles)
Online payment portal for existing customers
Vehicle service and maintenance at Flores St. location
Pre-approval consultations by phone or text
Vehicle valuation tool ('What's Your Car Worth?')
Limited warranty coverage on purchased vehicles
Directions and location information for two branch offices
